videos.headline: Stanford's Jackson Harris finds end zone vs. TCU
videos.description: Stanford's Jackson Harris scores the 3-yard touchdown early vs. TCU at home.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Stanford’s Jackson Harris finds end zone vs. TCU) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Hoover, Williams connect for TCU TD
videos.description: Josh Hoover connects with Savion Williams for the TCU touchdown at the end of the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Hoover, Williams connect for TCU TD) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ismael Cisse hauls in great TD catch in corner of end zone
videos.description: Stanford's Ismael Cisse makes the amazing haul in the corner of the end zone vs. TCU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ismael Cisse hauls in great TD catch in corner of end zone) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ashton Daniels' pass bounces off TCU defender for INT
videos.description: Stanford QB Ashton Daniels throws a pass to his receiver, but it bounces off a TCU linebacker and into the hands of Tymon Mitchell.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ashton Daniels' pass bounces off TCU defender for INT) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Josh Hoover calls his own number to give TCU first lead
videos.description: Josh Hoover sneaks into the end zone with a 1-yard touchdown that gives TCU its first lead of the night over Stanford.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Josh Hoover calls his own number to give TCU first lead) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Justin Lamson gives Cardinal lead with 1-yard TD
videos.description: Justin Lamson's touchdown gives Stanford a 23-20 lead over TCU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justin Lamson gives Cardinal lead with 1-yard TD) 2024/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jack Bech hauls in go-ahead TD for TCU in the 4th
videos.description: Jack Bech's touchdown gives TCU the lead with just over three minutes to go.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jack Bech hauls in go-ahead TD for TCU in the 4th) 2024/08/31 ESHEET
